flashcards.question: Solve x² - 9 > 0
flashcards.answer: x < -3 or x > 3. Parabola opens up, above x-axis outside roots.

flashcards.question: Solve -x² + 4 ≤ 0
flashcards.answer: x ≤ -2 or x ≥ 2. Opens down, below x-axis outside zeros.

flashcards.question: Sign analysis: (x-1)(x+2) > 0
flashcards.answer: x < -2 or x > 1. Test intervals: negative, zero, positive regions.

flashcards.question: When does ax² + bx + c < 0 have no solution?
flashcards.answer: When a > 0 and discriminant < 0 (parabola entirely above x-axis).

flashcards.question: Solve (x-2)² ≥ 0
flashcards.answer: All real x. Perfect square always ≥ 0.

flashcards.question: Test point method: test x = 0 in x(x-5) > 0
flashcards.answer: 0(0-5) = 0, not > 0. So x = 0 not in solution set.
